## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm turbo run lint typecheck test build` passes locally
- [ ] If this touches `@artui/cli` or `@artui/mcp`, I added a Changeset (`pnpm changeset`)
- [ ] If this changes component behavior, I added or updated a Vitest test that exercises the accessibility contract (keyboard, focus, ARIA)
- [ ] If this changes props or behavior, I updated the corresponding `meta.ts` and the docs page
